mano_cua.result_summary: CSS 变量 --sdt-bg-selected 未正确控制选中状态背景色。在 DevTools Elements 面板中为 svelty-picker 根元素设置 --sdt-bg-selected: red 后，日历和时钟面板中选中元素（如时钟面板的'00'小时指示器）背景色仍为默认深蓝色，未变为红色。说明 --sdt-table-selected-bg 和 --sdt-clock-selected-bg 未正确回退使用 --sdt-bg-selected 变量值。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Applied --sdt-bg-selected: red to the root element via DevTools. The selected indicator on the clock face (00 hour) and other selected elements remain dark navy/blue instead of turning red. The CSS variable fallback chain is broken - --sdt-table-selected-bg and --sdt-clock-selected-bg do not properly fall back to --sdt-bg-selected.
